idea-plugin.name: YAML Properties Hinter
idea-plugin.description:
Displays the full properties-style dot-notation path for YAML keys as a block inlay hint above the current line.

Full path hint

Shows the dot-notation path (e.g. # spring.datasource.url) above the current line.

Multi-line selection

Select multiple lines to see all property paths at once.

Click to copy

Click the hint to copy the path to clipboard. For keys with values, choose between "Copy keys" and "Copy keys with values".

Settings

Settings > Tools > YAML Properties Hinter

  • Max paths to display — Maximum number of paths shown for a selection (default: 10)
  • Hint color — Customize the hint text color (default: #6A8759)
